notableEvents.label: Jose Altuve reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Jose Altuve reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Ben Williamson.

notableEvents.label: Christian Walker GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Christian Walker grounds into a double play, third baseman Junior Caminero to second baseman Ryan Vilade to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Isaac Paredes out at 2nd. Christian Walker out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jose Altuve reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Ben Williamson.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Yordan Alvarez strikes out swinging. Jose Altuve to 3rd. Jose Altuve steals (2) 2nd base. Jose Altuve to 3rd. Throwing error by catcher Hunter Feduccia.

notableEvents.label: Ryan Vilade pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Vilade flies out to right fielder Cam Smith.

notableEvents.label: Jonny DeLuca pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jonny DeLuca singles on a line drive to left fielder Zach Dezenzo.

notableEvents.label: Nick Fortes pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nick Fortes pops out to first baseman Christian Walker in foul territory.
